name: Tomato Salad with Pomegranate Molasses

ingredients.item: green Turkish long peppers, cut into thin rings, or 1 green pepper, thinly sliced lengthways
large red onion, cut in half and thinly sliced into half moons
sumac, plus a little extra to garnish

method: If using large tomatoes, chop them into rough 2cm (¾in) cubes, or, if using cherry or baby plum tomatoes, simply halve them. There is no science or precision to making this salad – you just chop the tomatoes as you like.
Arrange the tomatoes, pepper rings or strips and onion on a flat serving plate.

In another bowl combine the sumac, pomegranate molasses, crushed sea salt to taste and a little drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and give the ingredients a good mix. Drizzle the dressing evenly over the salad. Garnish with the walnuts and a little sprinkling of sumac and serve.
